response.justification: Bogdan is a strong candidate with a proven track record as a senior/staff engineer and a demonstrated passion for technology. His experience founding and developing GISCollective, an open-source geospatial data platform, aligns perfectly with the role's domain. Furthermore, his work on low-latency, high-throughput systems using Dlang at Dunnhumby demonstrates his capability in building performance-critical data pipelines. While his direct professional C++ experience is dated and he lacks Rust experience, his deep expertise in the systems language Dlang is a strong indicator he can quickly adapt and makes him a compelling candidate worth interviewing.
strengths: Direct and extensive experience building a geospatial data platform (GISCollective).
Proven ability to build and operate low-latency, high-throughput data systems.
Demonstrates a versatile "software craftsman" mindset with a broad tech stack and a history of self-initiated projects.
concerns: Lack of recent professional experience in C++; last relevant role was in 2015.
No experience with Rust, the listed alternative to C++.
Experience is in general geospatial data, not specifically routing tiles or navigation guidance solutions.
